title: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread
wikitext:
[]: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Kendrix » Sun Mar 07, 2021 10:43 am I came here to discuss the new 2 mins but I see the spoiler policy is already in effect. Obviously you can't link to one from here; You'll have to trust that we can all google it ourselves. The sole purpose of this thread is just to have somewhere to look up the answer to two questions: Does it exist yet? And is it subbed? I don't want to risk getting spoiled when there is nothing yet to be found. If it does indeed release on amazon that will do just as well. I think I'm gonna wait for a subbed one cause I want to properly understand what's happening but IDK if my self-control will suffice.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Joseki » Sun Mar 07, 2021 10:47 am AFAIK camrips should be discussed in the spoiler subforum, not here

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 07, 2021 10:49 am Yeah, I'll move it there real quick EDIT: Done

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by CharPenPen » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:04 am Did a camrip happen for the Demon Slayer movie? I feel like that goes a long way for determining the likelihood of whether that'll happen for this.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:06 am Just as a reminder, new images from the premiere are fine; links are not.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:08 am Ok, let's think about it. How long can it take? If I remember correctly Q took like a month to come out because it came from a screening somewhere else, because Japan's draconian policy must have scared everyone's Rei-patterned panties. But back then, if you wanted a good recording, you had to bring an ACTUAL camera to the theater. Not easy to conceal, not everyone has one. But now, in TYOOL 2021, easily concealable smartphones are no longer limited to potato recordings. High end phones are common enough, newer iPhones are popular enough. Now you can in theory have several guys record a chunk of the movie each with their own daily use phones, and then join the pieces together. Or are they going full TSA on the ticket line? Wouldn't surprise me.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:21 am Heaven Piercing Man wrote: Or are they going full TSA on the ticket line? Wouldn't surprise me.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Archer » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:28 am CharPenPen wrote: Did a camrip happen for the Demon Slayer movie? I feel like that goes a long way for determining the likelihood of whether that'll happen for this.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by hui43210 » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:32 am Archer wrote: CharPenPen#912298 wrote: Did a camrip happen for the Demon Slayer movie? I feel like that goes a long way for determining the likelihood of whether that'll happen for this.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by RamslEva » Sun Mar 07, 2021 12:16 pm CharPenPen wrote: Did a camrip happen for the Demon Slayer movie? I feel like that goes a long way for determining the likelihood of whether that'll happen for this.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 07, 2021 12:21 pm Afraid I cn't quite follow. Does this have anything to do with Shin Eva?

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Saint Eva » Sun Mar 07, 2021 12:22 pm I got emotional watching the footage. I don't think I'll be able to wait for months to watch a good quality rip. Even a terrible fansubbed camrip will now do.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by RamslEva » Sun Mar 07, 2021 12:35 pm Blockio wrote: Afraid I cn't quite follow. Does this have anything to do with Shin Eva?

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 07, 2021 12:36 pm Ah, I gotcha

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Sun Mar 07, 2021 1:20 pm Anyone who gets a cam rip of a 155 min film deserves a medal or two

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Marynou_penguin » Sun Mar 07, 2021 1:28 pm I mean, if a camrip takes up to a month this time around, we're probably better off waiting for Amazon to put the movie online. It shouldn't be that far away now.

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Stan » Sun Mar 07, 2021 2:04 pm This will now be my most checked thread on this forum

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by JuanSorel » Sun Mar 07, 2021 2:34 pm Stan wrote: This will now be my most checked thread on this forum

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by RamslEva » Sun Mar 07, 2021 2:39 pm JuanSorel wrote: Stan#912392 wrote: This will now be my most checked thread on this forum

[]: Re: Official Waiting For Camrip Thread Post by Cookie H Wilson » Sun Mar 07, 2021 2:56 pm Marynou_penguin wrote: I mean, if a camrip takes up to a month this time around, we're probably better off waiting for Amazon to put the movie online. It shouldn't be that far away now.
